_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in analyzing and optimizing SQL query execution plans, identifying performance bottlenecks, and implementing indexing, partitioning, and query restructuring strategies to improve data retrieval performance.
comments: DCWF ksa equal WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-006 (DA, cosine: 0.657), TF-K-003 (TF, cosine: 0.623).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.647). Shared vocabulary: [optimizing, performance, skill]. DCWF-only terms [database] vs WIDAI-only terms [analyzing, bottlenecks, data, execution, identifying, implementing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.914 (P=0.956, R=0.876). P exceeds R by 0.080 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in optimizing database performance." and "Skill in analyzing and optimizing SQL query execution plans, identifying perform" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.719 > STS 0.647 (gap +0.072). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [optimizing, performance, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 18.2%. Shared tokens: [optimizing, performance, skill]. DCWF-only: [database]. WIDAI-only: [analyzing, bottlenecks, data, execution, identifying, implementing].
